research.title: CVE-2026-42271 Chained with CVE-2026-48710 | LiteLLM Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution via Starlette Host Header Validation Bypass
research.summary: CVE-2026-42271 is a command injection vulnerability in LiteLLM’s MCP server test endpoints that was originally disclosed as requiring authentication. Horizon3.ai researchers confirmed that when chained with CVE-2026-48710, a Starlette “BadHost” Host Header.

research.title: Adobe Acrobat Reader Escript.api Use-After-Free Remote Code Execution
research.summary: Adobe Acrobat Reader Escript.api Use-After-Free Remote Code Execution By Michele Campa Overview In this blog post we take a look at a use-after-free vulnerability found in Adobe Acrobat Reader’s Escript.api module in February 2025. This issue was patched on.

research.title: Horizon3.ai Launches Rapid Response to Secure the Era of AI-Powered Attacks
research.summary: SAN FRANCISCO — June 1, 2026 — Horizon3.ai, the AI-native proactive security leader, today announced Rapid Response, a new capability that helps organizations identify, prioritize, and respond to emerging threats in an era of AI-driven vulnerability.

research.title: The Exploit Window Is Shrinking. Most Security Workflows Are Not.
research.summary: AI is accelerating vulnerability discovery, exploit development, and attacker weaponization faster than most organizations can adapt. Security teams are inundated with vulnerability disclosures, threat intelligence feeds, exploit chatter, and vendor.

vulns.title: Drupal Core SQL Injection Vulnerability
vulns.summary: Drupal Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation and remote code execution via specially crafted requests sent with the database abstraction API.
vulns.technicalSummary: Drupal Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation and remote code execution via specially crafted requests sent with the database abstraction API.
vulns.breakdown: Drupal Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation and remote code execution via specially crafted requests sent with the database abstraction API.
vulns.whatBroke: Drupal Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation and remote code execution via specially crafted requests sent with the database abstraction API.
vulns.reality: Realistic when the affected product is exposed and unpatched. The updater only includes this because public tooling signal was found at ambionics/cve-2026-9082-drupal-postgresql-rce.
vulns.exploitSyntax:
# authorized lab / owned targets only
git clone https://github.com/ambionics/cve-2026-9082-drupal-postgresql-rce
cd cve-2026-9082-drupal-postgresql-rce
python3 <script>.py --target https://<authorized-target>
# confirm exact flags in the linked GitHub README before validation
chains: initial access through exposed Core
credential access from service context
webshell or command execution follow-up
internal pivot from an internet-facing control point
lateral movement if secrets or management access are recovered
vulns.weaponized: Likely worth tracking because public tooling exists and recent source activity was observed.
